note: First tag stamps the utterance-trace JSON format as already shipped and proven (ARCH-19 controller envelope + the ARCH-38 satellite merged shape). Doc-canonical per the ws-protocol model: the artifact is the hand-written reference section in the tracing guide; no `artifacts` byte-enumeration because the guide's prose evolves — the normative surface is versioned by the triple (doc line, TRACE_FORMAT_VERSION, this STAMP) under test. Additive keys keep the version; a key removed, renamed, or repurposed bumps it.
